title: Classify triangles by angles
description: Practice identifying triangles by their angles as acute, right, or obtuse.
topic_path: Module 4: Angle measure and plane figures
Topic D: Two-dimensional figures and symmetry

hints:
###What are the types of triangles?

An $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle has $3$ acute angles. 

A  $\purpleC{\text{right}}$  triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ right angle.

An $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ obtuse angle.

###What types of angles are in $\triangle{ABC}$?


$\angle{A}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.

$\angle{B}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.

$\angle{C}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.
$\triangle{ABC}$ has $\blueD{\text{3 acute angles}}$.
$\triangle{ABC}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle.

options.alt: A triangle ABC. The angles at ABC are all acute angles.

choices.content: Acute triangle
Obtuse triangle
Right triangle

hints:

###What types of angles are in $\triangle{ABC}$?


$\angle{A}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.

Right triangle

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which figure is an acute triangle?**  

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
###What are the types of triangles?

An $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle has $3$ acute angles. 

A  $\purpleC{\text{right}}$  triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ right angle.

An $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ obtuse angle.
$\triangle{DEF}$ has $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles and $\greenD{\text{1 obtuse}}$ angle, so it is an $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle.


[[☃ image 1]]

$\triangle{PQR}$ has $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles and $\purpleC{\text{1 right}}$ angle, so it is a $\purpleC{\text{right}}$ triangle.


[[☃ image 1]]

$\triangle{MNO}$ has $\blueD{\text{3 acute}}$ angles, so it is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle.


[[☃ image 1]]

$\triangle{MNO}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle.



[[☃ image 1]]

**Which figure is an acute triangle?**  

[[☃ radio 3]]
hints:
###What are the types of triangles?

An $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle has $3$ acute angles. 

A  $\purpleC{\text{right}}$  triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ right angle.

An $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ obtuse angle.
$\triangle{ABC}$ has $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles and $\purpleC{\text{1 right}}$ angle, so it is a $\purpleC{\text{right}}$ triangle.



[[☃ image 1]]

$\triangle{PQR}$ has $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles and $\greenD{\text{1 obtuse}}$ angle, so it is an $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle.

[[☃ image 1]]

$\triangle{STU}$ has $\blueD{\text{3 acute}}$ angles, so it is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle.


[[☃ image 1]]

$\triangle{STU}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle.



[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A triangle ABC. The angle at A has a box at its vertex connecting lines AB and AC. The angles at B and C are acute angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f3758a61889433e9e71353949ca035f8e4a4364a)
![A triangle PQR. The angle at P is obtuse. The angles at Q and R are acute angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/63615828515bc409b91de71c70799b6487562b40)
![A triangle STU. The angles at STU are all acute angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0355e4a6184469ab665e560c4b95f1484a6a27b7)

hints:
###What are the types of triangles?

An $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle has $3$ acute angles. 

A  $\purpleC{\text{right}}$  triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ right angle.

An $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ obtuse angle.

###What are the measures of $\triangle{ABC}$'s angles?

$\angle{A} $ is a $\purpleC{\text{right}}$ angle.

$\angle{B}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.

$\angle{C}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.
$\triangle{ABC}$ has $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles and $\purpleC{\text{1 right}}$ angle.
$\triangle{ABC}$ is a $\purpleC{\text{right}}$ triangle.

options.alt: A triangle ABC. The angle at A has a box at its vertex connecting lines AB and AC. The angles at B and C are acute angles.

choices.content: Acute triangle
Obtuse triangle
Right triangle

hints:
###What are the types of triangles?

An $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle has $3$ acute angles. 

A  $\purpleC{\text{right}}$  triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ right angle.

An $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ obtuse angle.

###What are the measures of $\triangle{JKL}$'s angles?

$\angle{J} $ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.

$\angle{K}$ is a $\purpleC{\text{right}}$ angle.

$\angle{L}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.
$\triangle{JKL}$ has $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles and $\purpleC{\text{1 right}}$ angle.
$\triangle{JKL}$ is a $\purpleC{\text{right}}$ triangle.

options.alt: A triangle JKL. The angle at K has a box at its vertex connecting lines KJ and KL. The angles at J and L are acute angles.

choices.content: Acute triangle
Obtuse triangle
Right triangle

hints:

A  $\purpleC{\text{right}}$  triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ right angle.

An $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ obtuse angle.
$\triangle{JKL}$ has $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles and $\greenD{\text{1 obtuse}}$ angle, so it is an $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle.



[[☃ image 1]]

$\triangle{XYZ}$ has $\blueD{\text{3 acute}}$ angles, so it is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle.



[[☃ image 1]]

$\triangle{PQR}$ has $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles and $\purpleC{\text{1 right}}$ angle, so it is a $\purpleC{\text{right}}$ triangle.

hints:
###What are the types of triangles?

An $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle has $3$ acute angles. 

A  $\purpleC{\text{right}}$  triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ right angle.

An $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ obtuse angle.

###What are the measures of $\triangle{GHI}$'s angles?


$\angle{G} $ is an $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ angle.

$\angle{H}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.

$\angle{I}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.
$\triangle{GHI}$ has $\greenD{\text{1 obtuse angle}}$ and $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles.
$\triangle{GHI}$ is an $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle.

options.alt: A triangle GHI. The angle at G is obtuse. The angles at H and I are acute angles.

Obtuse triangle
Right triangle

hints:

An $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ triangle has $3$ acute angles. 

A  $\purpleC{\text{right}}$  triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ right angle.

An $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle has $2$ acute angles and $1$ obtuse angle.

###What are the measures of $\triangle{DEF}$'s angles?


$\angle{D} $ is an $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ angle.

$\angle{E}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.

$\angle{F}$ is an $\blueD{\text{acute}}$ angle.
$\triangle{DEF}$ has $\greenD{\text{1 obtuse angle}}$ and $\blueD{\text{2 acute}}$ angles.
$\triangle{DEF}$ is an $\greenD{\text{obtuse}}$ triangle.

Obtuse triangle
